description_long: This is a barefoot elderly man with a bald head, standing upright with arms extended horizontally. He is dressed in a long-sleeved, buttoned maroon shirt that reaches past his hips and loose-fitting green pants. His facial features include a prominent nose, visible ears, and a neutral expression, with some subtle wrinkles suggesting age. The figure's build is average, and his hands and feet are proportionate, with fingers and toes clearly modeled. The clothing appears simple and unadorned, with no visible patterns or accessories. The overall appearance is that of a casually dressed elderly man, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or residential areas.
description: A barefoot elderly man with a bald head, wearing a maroon long-sleeved shirt and green pants, standing upright with arms outstretched. His facial features are neutral and subtly wrinkled, and his clothing is simple and casual.
description_view_0: Front view shows the man's face, bald head, maroon shirt, green pants, and bare feet with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, nose, and the length of the shirt and pants, with the left arm and foot visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the bald head, the full length of the maroon shirt, green pants, and both arms and feet from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the head, right arm, and the side of the shirt and pants, with the right foot visible.
attribute_clothing_style: Long-sleeved maroon buttoned shirt and loose green pants, both casual and unpatterned, with no visible accessories.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally.
attribute_facial_features: Prominent nose, visible ears, subtle wrinkles, no facial hair, and a neutral expression.
